description.p: SeznamDS provides an up-to-date dataset of Czech DataBox (Datová schránka) identifiers as XML files, sourced from the official Czech government registry. The data covers public authorities (OVM), legal entities (PO), natural persons doing business (PFO), and physical persons.

The XML files are installed to /var/lib/seznamds/ and are consumed by applications that look up or validate Czech DataBox identifiers, such as accounting software and government e-services integrations.
